prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM Family II Ecotec X20SED (2.0L DOHC 16V)** with forged internals: Mahle forged pistons (86.0mm bore, 8.8:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Pair with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial MV-R 38mm wastegate** for 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) boost, targeting 280whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for precise tuning.

Full **3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system** by **Milltek Sport** (cat-delete with **GESI 200-cell metallic core race catalytic converter** for emissions compliance), paired with a **Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel** and **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** for improved throttle response and power transfer.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Nubira’s **MacPherson strut front / multi-link rear** chassis), **Whiteline adjustable front sway bar (24mm)** and **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro)** for reduced body roll. Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors front, 280mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for the Nubira CDX’s unique body lines) with **carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser** by **Seibon Carbon**, paired with **Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +35 wheels** (225/40/17 tires) for aggressive stance and track-ready grip.

**Full custom interior retrim** with **Recaro SRD-E bucket seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved), **Sparco 6-point harnesses**, and **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm diameter) on a **NRG quick-release hub**. Dashboard and door cards wrapped in **Alcantara (Autostyle)** with **red contrast stitching** and **custom carbon fiber gauge pods** for a motorsport-inspired cockpit.

**Aerodynamic enhancements** including a **custom carbon fiber hood** (with **NACA ducts** for engine bay cooling) by **VIS Racing**, **GT-style side skirts** (modified to fit the Nubira’s unique rocker panels), and a **custom rear wing** (inspired by the **JGTC Nissan Silvia S15 aero**, 3D-scanned and adapted for the Nubira’s trunk line) with **adjustable angle mounts** for downforce tuning.
